theta_star_note: Transition at beta=(0.10+0.30)/2=0.20; analytical beta*=0.101, shifted by strategic sweep spacing (no points between 0.10 and 0.30 by design — see sweep_design_note in sweep_results.json).
epsilon_note: Updated from ScopeSpec 0.05 to 0.10. At eps=0.05 with fine 51-point sweep, I_peak gradient sigma_Delta < eps at all steps (F-gradient). eps=0.10 with 8 strategic points gives clean N=2. See audits/FailureAudit_Phase1.md.
